description: The ButtonStringErase component can be used to remove characters from the beginning or end of a string whenever an IButton is pressed.

fields.TargetString: The string from which characters will be removed.
fields.EraseFromBeginning: Whether or not to remove characters from the beginning of the string.

usage: To function, the component simply needs to be attached to a slot that also has a button component attached to it. From then on, pressing that button will activate the ButtonStringErase, making it erase the first or last ``Count`` characters from its ``TargetString``.
